text.message: Can we get some twos in the house?
Cant do the right rob once?
Im at 2 and robbing me over blue?
You just stole twice from me
Im just doing what u been doing
Set the right bro he was 1 point up
Talking like u didnt rob me at 2pts?
And we are competing for space
Then dont cry when u get robbed once
Im just doing what u been doing
